item.title: What I’d rather get instead of flowers 🪷 it’s Artichoke season here! And if you ever wonder how to steam & how to eat an artichoke, it’s really much easier than you might think! 😋🙌🏼 #artichoke #snack #healthyfood #recipe #easyrecipe

item.title: Strawberry Shortcake Rice Krispies Treats with HOMEMADE PUFFED RICE, using only parboiled rice + salt?! 🤯 I only recently learned this hack and wow, the rice pop very quickly and turn out soooo crispy 🤌🏼 and not they’re not salty, the salt doesn’t melt in
item.description: Strawberry Shortcake Rice Krispies Treats with HOMEMADE PUFFED RICE, using only parboiled rice + salt?! 🤯 I only recently learned this hack and wow, the rice pop very quickly and turn out soooo crispy 🤌🏼 and not they’re not salty, the salt doesn’t melt in

item.title: Tricolor Rice Paper Dumplings 🥟 Happy Chinese New Year & welcome to Year of the Horse!! 🐎🧧🥰 I celebrated with these festive rice paper dumplings, they were sooo easy to make! And I colored them with beetroot 🫜, blue spirulina 🌊, and turmeric ☀️ #dumplings
item.description: Tricolor Rice Paper Dumplings 🥟 Happy Chinese New Year & welcome to Year of the Horse!! 🐎🧧🥰 I celebrated with these festive rice paper dumplings, they were sooo easy to make! And I colored them with beetroot 🫜, blue spirulina 🌊, and turmeric ☀️ #dumplings

item.title: I felt SO GUILTY about what I had to do to the bunny in the end… 😭💔🐇 but well that’s kinda the whole point of making a 3D Chocolate Bunny Piñata 🪅 also, anyone has any tips on how to avoid chocolate blooming? Please help 😭😵‍💫 #bunny #chocolate #cute #east

item.title: 3 Ingredient carrot wraps made with @wegmans spring veggies, creamy protein-packed hummus, and sweet and tangy fig balsamic glaze #ad You guys have often asked me, do I ever get bored of plant based food? Well tbh it's almost impossible to get "bored" wi
item.description: 3 Ingredient carrot wraps made with @wegmans spring veggies, creamy protein-packed hummus, and sweet and tangy fig balsamic glaze #ad You guys have often asked me, do I ever get bored of plant based food? Well tbh it's almost impossible to get "bored" wi

item.title: Healthies & easiest sweet potato chips! 🍠 💜💛🧡 All you need to do is: Steam the sweet potatoes; Slice them thin, the crush into a thin chip; Brush on a little bit of oil; Sesame seed optional! Bake at 350F for 20 min, let the cool down, done 🤌🏼😋 #snack #ea
item.description: Healthies & easiest sweet potato chips! 🍠 💜💛🧡 All you need to do is: Steam the sweet potatoes; Slice them thin, the crush into a thin chip; Brush on a little bit of oil; Sesame seed optional! Bake at 350F for 20 min, let the cool down, done 🤌🏼😋 #snack #ea

item.title: Quick pickled purple cauliflower 💜 did you know the natural vibrant color in purple cauliflowers is actually from their amazingly potent antioxidants? And the purple turns blue with alkaline but turns bright hot pink with acid 🦄 #pickle #guthealth #recipe
item.description: Quick pickled purple cauliflower 💜 did you know the natural vibrant color in purple cauliflowers is actually from their amazingly potent antioxidants? And the purple turns blue with alkaline but turns bright hot pink with acid 🦄 #pickle #guthealth #recipe
